entry.title: RIVAL RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RIV-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.9
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-RIV-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.9

Part: FIVAL RIVAL RD 1x

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - Minor Bugfix and reliability improvement.

Released: 2026-03-04

entry.title: RIVAL RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RIV-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.6
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-RIV-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.6

Part: FIVAL RIVAL RD 1x

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-15

entry.title: RIVAL RD (RD-RIV-E-E1) — firmware 2.54.4
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD RD-RIV-E-E1 — firmware 2.54.4

Part: FIVAL RIVAL RD 2x

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported. - Future Product Support

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: RIVAL FD (FD-RIV-E-E1) — firmware 2.54.0
entry.summary:
RIVAL FD FD-RIV-E-E1 — firmware 2.54.0

Part: FIVAL RIVAL FD

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version  before installing this Device Firmware Update.   This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-09

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.summary:
RIVAL CONTROLLER (L) ED-RIV-E1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: FIVAL Rival ED (L)

entry.title: RIVAL RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-RIV1-E-D1) — firmware 2.49.6
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-RIV1-E-D1 — firmware 2.49.6

Part: RIVAL RD MAX 44T

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. FW 2.49.6 contains improvements in the support and verification of the Firmware during the factory production of the Rear Derailleur.

Released: 2024-10-05

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.41.0
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.41.0

Part: RIVAL RD

General bug fixes and reliability improvements. General improvements to Ant+ gear position and battery status reporting.

Released: 2022-12-14

entry.title: RIVAL FD WIDE (FD-RIV-EW-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
RIVAL FD WIDE FD-RIV-EW-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: RIVAL FD WIDE

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: RIVAL FD (FD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
RIVAL FD FD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: RIVAL FD

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: RIVAL RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-RIV1-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-RIV1-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: RIVAL RD MAX 44T

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: RIVAL RD

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09
